_comment: Hand-labeled gold standard for SMI-4586 Goal #3 — CLAUDE.md regex recall. Trigger phrases are bullet items under Trigger phrases / Use when / Skills sections, or under MCP-tools-style explicit invocation lists.
_normalized_form: lowercase, trim trailing punctuation, collapse internal whitespace

skillsmith-CLAUDE.md.notes: Operational/standards CLAUDE.md — no Trigger phrases / Use when sections. The Skillsmith MCP Tools table lists tool names (search, get_skill, install_skill, etc.) but those are tool identifiers, not natural-language trigger phrases. Gold = empty.

anthropic-cookbook.md.notes: Has Slash Commands section listing /notebook-review, /model-check, /link-review. These are command identifiers exposed in CC and CI. Counted as gold.

anthropic-quickstarts.md.notes: Lists shell commands (./setup.sh, ruff check, npm run dev) but these are not trigger phrases — they're CLI invocations. No Use when / Trigger phrases sections. Gold = empty.

synthetic-typescript-monorepo.md.notes: Has explicit Trigger phrases section (6 quoted phrases) and Use when section (3 bullets).
gold_phrases: use when the user asks to bump versions across all packages
use when the user wants to test a single package in isolation
use when the user reports a flaky ci run

synthetic-saas-app.md.notes: Has Trigger phrases section (6 phrases) and Use when section (3 bullets).
gold_phrases: use when the user asks to add a new pricing tier
use when the user reports a 401 from a webhook
use when the user wants to a/b-test an email subject line
